name: Truckee Gravel - Medium Course
notes: Mostly flat-to-rolling with short punchy climbs. Limiter for this athlete is aerobic durability + threshold over 4+ hours, not the punches.

name: Endurance ride + timed climb
format: Long endurance ride with ONE timed climb (~6 mi / 1500 ft, ~4.8% avg). Hard on the climb only, easy everywhere else. Not a mass-start race.
notes: The timed climb is a ~30-40 min sustained near-threshold effort - exactly the limiter. Doubles as durability + a threshold test. Pull the segment afterward for an eFTP / ~35 min power data point to refine FTP and Week 2.

name: Lost & Found - Mid (Mid Moo)
location: Portola / Lake Davis, CA (~5,500 ft altitude)
notes: Mostly flat-to-rolling gravel with short punchy climbs (notable ~1.3 km @ 7% at km 77). Used as Week 2's long durability ride and a Truckee rehearsal: controlled first 2/3, back-loaded threshold on late climbs, 80-90 g carbs/hr from the start.
